en: I had never seen anything so beautiful in my life.
ko: 내 인생에서 이렇게 아름다운 것은 처음 봤어.

en: She was like an angel. You're going to sit down, aren't you? What's wrong with your legs? I'm nothing at all, thank you.
ko: 그녀는 마치 천사 같았어. 앉을 거지? 다리가 왜 그래? 나는 괜찮아, 고마워.

en: My legs are just fine and dandy.
I just sat next to her on that bus and had a conversation all the way to school.
ko: 나는 그 버스에서 그녀 옆에 앉아 학교까지 대화를 나눴어.

en: My mama says my back is crooked like a question mark. These are going to make me a straight arrow.
ko: 엄마는 내 등이 물음표처럼 구부러졌다고 하셔. 이건 나를 곧게 만들어 줄 거야.

en: And next to mama, no one ever talked to me or asked me questions.
ko: 엄마 외에는 아무도 나에게 말을 걸거나 질문하지 않았어.

en: Mama says stupid is as stupid does.
ko: 엄마는 바보는 바보처럼 행동하는 거라고 하셔.

en: From that day on, we was always together.
She and me was like peas and carrots.
She taught me how to climb.
ko: 그녀는 나에게 오르는 법을 가르쳐 줬어.
